conventions.name: game-modules
conventions.description: Every server game module exports a <id>Module GameModule and wires into ../types.js

conventions.name: game-module-move-union
conventions.description: Every game module exports a typed move union named <Id>Move

conventions.name: game-modules-are-pure
conventions.description: Game modules except chess are pure reducers: no runtime imports outside the games runtime

conventions.name: game-renderers
conventions.description: Every web game renderer default-exports its component

conventions.name: hooks-named-after-file
conventions.description: Every hook file exports a hook named after the file

conventions.name: components-default-export
conventions.description: Single-component files default-export their component; multi-component kits are negated exceptions

conventions.name: package-manifest
conventions.description: Every workspace package has a package.json

conventions.name: package-readme
conventions.description: Every workspace package has a README.md
